decisions.title_en: Anthropic ships Claude Opus 4.8 with major coding and math gains, beats GPT-5.5
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Frontier model release with SWE-bench Pro 69.2 (vs GPT-5.5 58.6), USAMO 2026 96.7%, OSWorld 83.4, fast mode 2.5x faster at 3x lower cost.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic closes Series H $65B at $965B post-money, surpasses OpenAI valuation
decisions.reason: Previously published on 05-22 ('Anthropic $30B+ 新轮下周敲定 $900B+ 估值 -- Sequoia/Dragoneer/Altimeter/Greenoaks 各 ~'). New info: deal officially closed 5-28 at $65B raised / $965B post-money (vs $30B+/$900B+ rumored), $47B run-rate revenue confirmed, Samsung/SK Hynix/Micron joined as strategic infrastructure partners, valuation now exceeds OpenAI's $852B.

decisions.title_en: Dell Q1 FY27 record: $43.8B revenue, $16.1B AI servers +757% YoY
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Dell reported Q1 FY27 on 5-28: record $43.8B revenue (+88% YoY), $16.1B AI server revenue (+757% YoY), $24.4B AI orders booked, FY27 AI server guidance raised from prior to $60B, shares +25% after-hours.

decisions.title_en: Snowflake jumps 38% on $6B AWS deal and Q1 blowout
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Snowflake on 5-28 reported Q1 product revenue $1.334B (+34% YoY), signed 5-year $6B AWS commitment (more than doubling prior agreement), raised FY guidance to $5.8B; stock +38% in best day on record, also acquired Natoma (MCP platform for AI agents).

decisions.title_en: Cisco research: all closed frontier AI models break under multi-turn attacks, ASR up to 88%
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Cisco AI threat intelligence team report covering 30,000 single-turn prompts and 7,000 multi-turn attacks across 15 closed flagship models from OpenAI/Anthropic/Google/Amazon/xAI; multi-turn ASR up to 88%, Gemini 3 Pro +55 points under iterative attack; recommends moving security perimeter outside the model.

decisions.title_en: Meta launches Plus subscriptions globally across Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp; Meta One AI tiers enter testing
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Meta on 5-27 launched paid Plus subscriptions globally -- WhatsApp Plus $2.99/mo, Instagram Plus $3.99/mo, Facebook Plus $3.99/mo -- plus Meta One Plus $7.99/mo and Meta One Premium $19.99/mo AI subscriptions entering testing in Singapore/Guatemala/Bolivia in June.

decisions.title_en: Catalyst Brands deploys Figure AI humanoids at Reno DC for sort/pack automation
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Catalyst Brands (JCPenney parent) announced 5-26 commercial partnership deploying Figure AI humanoid robots at its Reno NV Distribution Logistics Center for repetitive sorting/packing tasks. Figure's first major US retail logistics commercial deployment; follows recent 50-hour autonomous package sort milestone.

decisions.title_en: Tensormesh $20M extension from Nvidia, AMD, CoreWeave for KV-cache inference platform
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Tensormesh announced 5-27 a $20M seed extension (total $24.5M) led by AMD Ventures, CoreWeave, NVentures (NVIDIA); launched SaaS KV-cache inference platform claiming up to 10x latency/GPU cost reduction; team led by UChicago/UCB/CMU faculty including LMCache co-creator Junchen Jiang.

decisions.title_en: Cognition $1B Series D at $25B pre-money $26B post valuation
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-05-27 with detailed coverage of the same $1B Series D close at $26B valuation. No substantive new information found on 5-28/5-29 beyond what was already published.

decisions.title_en: xAI launches Custom Skills for Grok user-defined reusable tasks

The Custom Skills feature is a relatively minor productivity addition and not differentiated enough from prior Grok platform coverage to warrant a fresh slot today; deprioritized in favor of higher-impact stories.

decisions.title_en: FDA announces real-time clinical trials initiative with proof-of-concept
decisions.reason: FDA real-time trials infrastructure story has thin AI angle and is more pharma-policy than AI news; deprioritized in favor of stories with stronger frontier-AI relevance.

decisions.title_en: Tempus AI hosts inaugural Investor Day
decisions.reason: Investor Day is a procedural corporate event with limited AI-news substance; no specific product/research/strategic announcements yet reported. Deprioritized.
